/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy.physics import units
from sympy.physics.units.systems.si import SI
v1 = units.Quantity('v1_api_probe')
SI.set_quantity_dimension(v1, units.velocity)
SI.set_quantity_scale_factor(v1, 2 * units.meter / units.second)
a1 = units.Quantity('a1_api_probe')
SI.set_quantity_dimension(a1, units.acceleration)
SI.set_quantity_scale_factor(a1, -9.8 * units.meter / units.second**2)
t1 = units.Quantity('t1_api_probe')
SI.set_quantity_dimension(t1, units.time)
SI.set_quantity_scale_factor(t1, 5 * units.second)
prod_dim = SI._collect_factor_and_dimension(a1*t1)[1]
vel_dim = SI._collect_factor_and_dimension(v1)[1]
dimsys = SI.get_dimension_system()
print('prod_dim:', prod_dim)
print('vel_dim:', vel_dim)
print('structural equality:', prod_dim == vel_dim)
print('equivalent_dims:', dimsys.equivalent_dims(prod_dim, vel_dim))
print('prod dependencies:', dimsys.get_dimensional_dependencies(prod_dim))
print('vel dependencies:', dimsys.get_dimensional_dependencies(vel_dim))
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "rg -n \"velocity|acceleration\" sympy/physics/units/definitions/dimension_definitions.py sympy/physics/units/systems/si.py sympy/physics/units/systems/mks.py sympy/physics/units --glob '*.py' | head -n 160
nl -ba sympy/physics/units/dimensions.py | sed -n '1,115p'
./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy.physics import units
from sympy.physics.units.systems.si import SI
v1 = units.Quantity('v1_probe')
SI.set_quantity_dimension(v1, units.velocity)
SI.set_quantity_scale_factor(v1, 2 * units.meter / units.second)
a1 = units.Quantity('a1_probe')
SI.set_quantity_dimension(a1, units.acceleration)
SI.set_quantity_scale_factor(a1, -9.8 * units.meter / units.second**2)
t1 = units.Quantity('t1_probe')
SI.set_quantity_dimension(t1, units.time)
SI.set_quantity_scale_factor(t1, 5 * units.second)
expr = a1*t1 + v1
print(expr.args)
for a in expr.args:
    print(a, SI._collect_factor_and_dimension(a))
ds = SI.get_dimension_system()
d1 = units.acceleration*units.time
d2 = units.velocity
print('structural', d1, d2, d1 == d2)
print('deps', ds.get_dimensional_dependencies(d1), ds.get_dimensional_dependencies(d2))
print('equiv', ds.equivalent_dims(d1, d2))
try:
    print(SI._collect_factor_and_dimension(expr))
except Exception as e:
    print(type(e).__name__, e)
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy.physics import units
from sympy.physics.units.systems.si import SI

v1 = units.Quantity('v1_probe')
SI.set_quantity_dimension(v1, units.velocity)
SI.set_quantity_scale_factor(v1, 2 * units.meter / units.second)
a1 = units.Quantity('a1_probe')
SI.set_quantity_dimension(a1, units.acceleration)
SI.set_quantity_scale_factor(a1, -9.8 * units.meter / units.second**2)
t1 = units.Quantity('t1_probe')
SI.set_quantity_dimension(t1, units.time)
SI.set_quantity_scale_factor(t1, 5 * units.second)

dimsys = SI.get_dimension_system()
product_dim = SI._collect_factor_and_dimension(a1*t1)[1]
print(product_dim)
print(v1.dimension)
print(dimsys.get_dimensional_dependencies(product_dim))
print(dimsys.get_dimensional_dependencies(v1.dimension))
print(dimsys.equivalent_dims(product_dim, v1.dimension))
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "rg -n \"velocity:|acceleration:\" sympy/physics/units/systems sympy/physics/units | head -n 80 && ./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy.physics.units import Quantity, velocity, acceleration, time, meter, second, length
from sympy.physics.units.systems.si import SI
from sympy.physics.units import Dimension
V1=Quantity('V1_probe'); SI.set_quantity_dimension(V1, velocity); SI.set_quantity_scale_factor(V1,meter/second)
A1=Quantity('A1_probe'); SI.set_quantity_dimension(A1, acceleration); SI.set_quantity_scale_factor(A1,meter/second**2)
T1=Quantity('T1_probe'); SI.set_quantity_dimension(T1,time); SI.set_quantity_scale_factor(T1,second)
expr=A1*T1+V1
ds=SI.get_dimension_system()
for term in expr.args:
    print(term, SI._collect_factor_and_dimension(term))
print(expr.args)
print('equiv:', ds.equivalent_dims(acceleration*time, velocity))
print('deps lhs:', ds.get_dimensional_dependencies(acceleration*time))
print('deps rhs:', ds.get_dimensional_dependencies(velocity))
print('structural:', acceleration*time == velocity)
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "rg -n \"velocity:|acceleration:\" sympy/physics/units/systems sympy/physics/units | head -n 80 && ./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy.physics.units import Quantity, velocity, acceleration, time, meter, second, length
from sympy.physics.units.systems.si import SI
from sympy.physics.units import Dimension
V1=Quantity('V1_probe'); SI.set_quantity_dimension(V1, velocity); SI.set_quantity_scale_factor(V1,meter/second)
A1=Quantity('A1_probe'); SI.set_quantity_dimension(A1, acceleration); SI.set_quantity_scale_factor(A1,meter/second**2)
T1=Quantity('T1_probe'); SI.set_quantity_dimension(T1,time); SI.set_quantity_scale_factor(T1,second)
expr=A1*T1+V1
ds=SI.get_dimension_system()
for term in expr.args:
    print(term, SI._collect_factor_and_dimension(term))
print(expr.args)
print('equiv:', ds.equivalent_dims(acceleration*time, velocity))
print('deps lhs:', ds.get_dimensional_dependencies(acceleration*time))
print('deps rhs:', ds.get_dimensional_dependencies(velocity))
print('structural:', acceleration*time == velocity)
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy.physics import units
from sympy.physics.units.systems.si import SI

v1 = units.Quantity('v1_verify')
SI.set_quantity_dimension(v1, units.velocity)
SI.set_quantity_scale_factor(v1, 2 * units.meter / units.second)
a1 = units.Quantity('a1_verify')
SI.set_quantity_dimension(a1, units.acceleration)
SI.set_quantity_scale_factor(a1, -9.8 * units.meter / units.second**2)
t1 = units.Quantity('t1_verify')
SI.set_quantity_dimension(t1, units.time)
SI.set_quantity_scale_factor(t1, 5 * units.second)
print(SI._collect_factor_and_dimension(a1*t1 + v1))
try:
    SI._collect_factor_and_dimension(v1 + t1)
except ValueError as exc:
    print(type(exc).__name__, exc)
else:
    raise AssertionError('incompatible dimensions were accepted')
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "sed -n '145,200p' sympy/physics/units/tests/test_quantities.py
./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy.physics import units
from sympy.physics.units.systems.si import SI
from sympy.physics.units.dimensions import Dimension
# Existing source has the proposed predicate due to a concurrent edit.
for lhs, rhs in [
    (units.velocity, units.acceleration * units.time),
    (units.length, units.time),
    (Dimension(1), units.length / units.length),
]:
    ds = SI.get_dimension_system()
    print(lhs, rhs, '==', lhs == rhs, 'equiv', ds.equivalent_dims(lhs, rhs))
PY"
